name: Standard Box Stitch Microfiber Kids' Quilt Sham Pillowcase Berry Red - Pillowfort™
description: Brighten your child’s bedroom with this Standard Box-Stitch Microfiber Quilt Sham Pillowcase from Pillowfort™. The microfiber sham showcases a box-stitched front in berry red and a coordinating solid-color reverse side. Made from 100% recycled polyester and backing, this machine-washable sham with a six-inch envelope closure adds comfort and functional style to their bedroom linen collection.
